name: Beef Bourguignon
recipeIngredient: 3 lb. chuck OR sirloin OR blade cut roast, trimmed and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry bacon in butter until crispy.
2. Dust meat with flour and brown in the bacon and butter mixture.
3. Add soup and soup mix, wine, tomato sauce, beef broth, Kitchen Bouquet to the pot. Adjust seasonings. Salt may not be necessary due to the bacon.
4. Mix well and bring to a boil on top of the stove.
5. Cover with foil and place in oven.
6. Cook for 1 1/2 - 2 hours at 350°F.
7. Add mushrooms during the last 30 minutes to prevent overcooking.
8. Serve with noodles or rice. Serves 6-8.
